{{CargoRelic
|name=Moondance Film Award
|class_id=20099
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The Moondance Film Festival was founded in the 1980s and held by the Moondance Institute. As the world's leading independent film festival, it aims to encourage the production of low-cost movies. It is favored by Hollywood and has funded many famous directors!
|fame=13
|art=13
|fth=15
|civ=34
|tech=15
|ss1=Event Avatar rating cap raised to 4S+<br>Obtain Avatar (Event Ambassador)<br>W-tads from Daily Packs +10<br>W-tads from Daily Silver Packs +10<br>W-tads from Daily Gold Pack +10
|ss2=Event Avatar rating cap raised to 4S+<br>Obtain Avatar (Event Ambassador)<br>W-tads from Daily Packs +20<br>W-tads from Daily Silver Packs +20<br>W-tads from Daily Gold Pack +20
|ss3=Event Avatar rating cap raised to 4S+<br>Obtain Avatar (Event Ambassador)<br>W-tads from Daily Packs +30<br>W-tads from Daily Silver Packs +30<br>W-tads from Daily Gold Pack +30
|ss4=Event Avatar rating cap raised to 4S+<br>Obtain Avatar (Event Ambassador)<br>W-tads from Daily Packs +30<br>W-tads from Daily Silver Packs +30<br>W-tads from Daily Gold Pack +30
|ss7=Event Avatar rating cap raised to 4S+<br>Obtain Avatar (Event Ambassador)<br>W-tads from Daily Packs +30<br>W-tads from Daily Silver Packs +30<br>W-tads from Daily Gold Pack +30<br> (Awakened)
}}
